header.implementation: Restyle existing site.layout header to a compact translucent global navigation while preserving navCategories from the site composer.

footer.implementation: Restyle existing footer as a quiet legal footer, preserving GEOFlow copyright text.

home.hero.implementation: Centered oversized site title, subtitle, search, and two primary text actions mapped to home and archive routes.

home.featured_list.implementation: Featured articles render as large product-like editorial tiles with badges and blue text actions.

home.article_card.implementation: Latest articles use a responsive two-column tile grid and the shared theme article card partial.

category.article_card.implementation: Category pages show a support-center header, quick topic chips, and compact article rows.

article.hero.implementation: Narrow support document header with category breadcrumb, title, summary, and published date.

article.prose_shell.implementation: Rendered article HTML remains untouched and is styled for headings, lists, tables, code, images, and blockquotes.

article.related_articles.implementation: Related items are presented as simple numbered support links.

article.sticky_ad.implementation: Existing sticky ad data is rendered as a floating help card with dismiss behavior preserved.

archive.overview_row.implementation: Archive months render as quiet list rows with counts.

archive.article_card.implementation: Archive article rows use the same compact support card partial.
